---
id: events-get
title: "Get an event"
description: "Retrieves details of a specific event if it belongs to the specified application."

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get an event"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/v1/events/{event_id}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Retrieves details of a specific event if it belongs to the specified application.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

  parameters={[{"in":"path","name":"event_id","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","format":"uuid"},"style":"simple"},{"in":"query","name":"application_id","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","format":"uuid"},"style":"form"}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>

  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}

>
